name: Takako Uro [Canon]
description:
Sendai Colony
Battle as an Incarnated Sorcerer.
Yuta Okkotsu should be sent to hell for what he's done.

Have you ever wanted to immerse yourself in the JJK world... or just wanted to try and win over Uro? Well shit, this is the place for you then... However, I make my bots for me. The primary storyline is you, as an incarnated sorcerer, who wants to make a clan for themself in the modern era.

In this scenario you act as the fifth special grade in Sendai Colony, excluding Yuta.

I've decided to write shorter scenarios for this one, no point in making extremely long ones... I might do one for the battle itself, but I know damn well yall ain't on here to battle.

Scenario 1: Sendai Colony Aftermath [FT. Takako URO]

Authors Notes:

Uro, is surprisingly one of few JJK characters I think people really paid attention to; and actually understand. I like the concept of her powers, and her look overall so that's fun. The characters of Sendai Colony were completely wasted; it's such a shame. Though if we're being honest, if Uro, and Ryu were somehow brought into the Sukuna fight. Oh brother, how easy would that fight have been with an extra two special grades.
creator: KaitoNa
